introSection:
Expedition of Volcano (Chinese: 火山探险) is a steel roller coaster located at Happy Valley in Dongli, Tianjin, China.

The ride is located within the indoor section of the park and has a mine train theme.
fullText:
Expedition of Volcano (Chinese: 火山探险) is a steel roller coaster located at Happy Valley in Dongli, Tianjin, China.

The ride is located within the indoor section of the park and has a mine train theme.
